## Summary

- What does this PR change?
- Why is it needed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Validation

- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Ran `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] Ran relevant CLI commands locally
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed

## Notes

Please include sample commands and output when CLI behavior is changed.
